data.title: Floragy Natural Skincare & Floragy Pro
data.metaDescription: Floragy is a Faversham, UK based, natural skincare brand, vegan friendly, cruelty free, handmade in small batches using recyclable / reusable packaging with minimal plastic. We make face oils, serums, hair oils, cleansers, balms, clay masks. Producers of Floragy Pro, professional skincare for salons and therapists.
data.ogDescription: Floragy is a Faversham, UK based, natural skincare brand, vegan friendly, cruelty free, handmade in small batches using recyclable / reusable packaging with minimal plastic. We make face oils, serums, hair oils, cleansers, balms, clay masks. Producers of Floragy Pro, professional skincare for salons and therapists.

issues.impact: Google truncates long descriptions. Your call-to-action is probably getting cut off.
issues.fix: Trim to 150-160 characters. Put the most important info first.

issues.impact: Invisible to screen readers and search engines. You're losing Google Images traffic.
issues.fix: Add descriptive alt text to every image. Be specific, include keywords where natural.

summary: We analyzed floragy.co.uk and found 2 issues affecting your search visibility and conversions. The biggest opportunities are fixing your meta tags, improving mobile optimization, and adding structured data for rich snippets. These changes could significantly increase your organic traffic within 30-60 days.
